title: Decimal / NUMERIC (9,2) won't allow initial NULL value
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE decimal_test (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value NUMERIC(9, 2));
INSERT INTO decimal_test (id, value) VALUES (1, NULL);
SELECT * FROM decimal_test WHERE value IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE decimal_test2 (id SERIAL, value NUMERIC(9, 2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0);
key_bug_features: NUMERIC(9,2) does not accept initial NULL value
